title: Hey Cameron — Mario Kart banana drug thesis
html:
TL;DR

  • December 2021 message draft to Cameron (a stranger met "talking about crypto last night"). Reaches out to follow up.
  • Embedded in the same note: two crystallized aphorisms that become the title of his unwritten thesis on drugs:
    • "Molding sandwich is a great analogy for something repulsive."
    • "Drugs are a minor distraction, that done little, may not matter in the long term. But continuous minor distractions adds up to major blunders. Like a banana in Mario kart. Simply annoying and needing to be avoided."
  • The Mario-Kart-banana metaphor is the cleanest articulation of his drugs thesis — he's not anti-drug-on-principle; he's anti-cumulative-distraction.
  • "Cameron" is a crypto-curious stranger met in Corvallis nightlife. Whether they ever connected isn't documented.
  • Note signature "YG" — first explicit use of his initials-as-handle pattern.

Key quotes

"Hey Cameron this is YG, how are you doing dude. I don't know if you remember, but we met last night talking about crypto."

"Drugs are a minor distraction, that done little, may not matter in the long term. But continuous minor distractions adds up to major blunders. Like a banana in Mario kart. Simply annoying and needing to be avoided"

"Thesis on drugs"

Why it matters in the graph

  • Foundational text for the drugs thesis concept page — needs to be a real concept, not a stub. This is the canonical articulation.
  • Crypto-talk-with-strangers in Dec 2021 places Yahir in the late-2021 crypto-bull-market scene. Pairs with corvallis crypto club entity (already exists).
  • "YG" handle — same as the YG401BIZ Amazon FBA accounts in 2020 03 25 yg401biz amazon fba checks. Cross-platform identity continuity.

Open questions

  • Who is Cameron? Did they ever talk again?
  • Did the "thesis on drugs" get written somewhere?

Wikilinks
